title: Controls Gravity
summary: You can sway the attraction of gravity itself.
tiers: Tier 3: Define Down or Gravity Cleave
Tier 6: Improved Gravity Cleave or Weight of the World
Tier 3: Steal Power or Wildcard Powers
gm_intrusions: Onlookers react with unreasoning fear. A weird interaction sends an ally or object careening into the sky.
text: You can sway the attraction of gravity itself. Type Swap Option: Weighty COPIES SUPERPOWERS You can copy others’ skills, abilities, and superpowers. Copying GM Intrusions: A copied power ends unexpectedly or goes out of control. A copied power doesn’t bring secondary powers with it (like gaining superspeed without protection from air friction, or not being immune to the heat from your own fire bolts).
details: You can sway the attraction of gravity itself.
You can copy others’ skills, abilities, and superpowers.

Copying GM Intrusions: A copied power ends unexpectedly or goes out of control. A copied power doesn’t bring secondary powers with it (like gaining superspeed without protection from air friction, or not being immune to the heat from your own fire bolts).
